zh.lifeSummary: 當John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith於1459年1月1日出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾莫頓時，他的父親James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas33歲，母親Princess Joan Stewart30歲。他於1483年與Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton在蘇格蘭洛包爾利德爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith于1459年1月1日出生在苏格兰度福利爾莫頓时，他的父亲James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas33岁，母亲Princess Joan Stewart30岁。他于1483年与Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton在苏格兰洛包爾利德爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1513年9月9日在英国諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

en.lifeSummary: When John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith was born on 1 January 1459, in Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas, was 33 and his mother, Princess Joan Stewart, was 30. He married Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton in 1483, in Riddell, Roxburghshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 9 September 1513, in Branxton, Northumberland, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Branxton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith est né le 1 janvier 1459, à Morton, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Princess Joan Stewart, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton en 1483, à Riddell, Roxburghshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith am 1. Januar 1459 in Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas 33 und seine Mutter Princess Joan Stewart 30. Er hat 1483 in Riddell, Roxburghshire, Scotland Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Branxton, Northumberland, England und wurde in Branxton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith è nato il il 1 gennaio 1459 nel Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Princess Joan Stewart, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton nel 1483, nel Riddell, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 settembre 1513, nel Branxton, Northumberland, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Branxton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeithが1459年1月1日にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアモートンで生まれた時，父James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglasは33歳，母Princess Joan Stewartは30歳であった。1483年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアリッドエルでJanet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Mortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith(이)가 1459년 1월 1일 스컷랜드 드프리실르 모르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Princess Joan Stewart(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1483년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 리데에서 Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.1 January 1459–9 September 1513: 1 de janeiro de 1459–9 de setembro de 1513
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1459, em Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Princess Joan Stewart, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton em 1483, em Riddell, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith родился 1 января 1459 г. в местности мортон, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Princess Joan Stewart, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton в 1483 г. в местности ридделл, роксбургшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.1 January 1459–9 September 1513: 1 de enero de 1459–9 de septiembre de 1513
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith nació el 1 de enero de 1459, en Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, James Douglas Lord of DalKeith, First Earl Morton, Nineth Earl Douglas, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Princess Joan Stewart, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton en 1483, en Riddell, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1513, en Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
